info.title: Smart Home WebSocket API
info.description:
API documentation for Smart Home WebSocket Server. Manage users, devices, and schedules with JWT authentication.

## WebSocket Protocol

Connect to `ws://localhost:8080`

### ESP32 → Server (Register)
```json
{"type":"register","userId":1}
```

### Server → ESP32 (Sync on connect)
```json
{"type":"sync","devices":[{"slot":1,"name":"Lamp 1","status":"on"},{"slot":2,"name":"Fan","status":"off"}]}
```

### Server → ESP32 (Command on status change)
```json
{"type":"command","slot":2,"status":"on","deviceName":"Fan","time":"07:30:00"}
```

ESP32 filters by slot number to control the correct relay.

slot.description: Slot number on ESP32 (unique per user)

room_id.description: Room this device belongs to (null = unassigned)

icon.description: Icon name chosen on the frontend (overrides type's default icon)
Default icon name for this type

deviceCount.description: Number of devices of this type (on list endpoint)

icon.description: Icon name chosen on the frontend

deviceCount.description: Number of devices in this room (on list endpoint)

message.example: Name, email, and password are required.
Access token is missing or invalid.

slot.description: Slot number (unique per user, maps to ESP32 relay)

room_id.description: Room id (must belong to the user)

type_id.description: Device type id (must belong to the user)

icon.description: Icon name from the frontend list

room_id.description: Room id (must belong to the user, null to unassign)

type_id.description: Device type id (must belong to the user, null to clear)

icon.description: Icon name from the frontend list

post.summary: Update device status and broadcast via WebSocket

get.summary: Get all schedules (optionally filtered by device)
Get all rooms for the current user

200.description: List of rooms with device counts

icon.description: Icon name from the frontend list

get.summary: Get a room with its devices

delete.summary: Delete a room (devices in it become unassigned)

get.summary: Get all device types for the current user

200.description: List of device types with device counts

icon.description: Icon name from the frontend list

get.summary: Get a device type with its devices

delete.summary: Delete a device type (devices of this type become uncategorized)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by name or email (partial match)

200.description: List of users with device and schedule counts

get.summary: Get a single user with their devices and schedules (admin only)

delete.summary: Delete a user and their data (admin only)

409.description: Cannot demote the last remaining admin

get.summary: List all devices across users (admin only)

200.description: List of devices with their owner

get.summary: List all rooms across users (admin only)

200.description: List of rooms with their owner

get.summary: List all device types across users (admin only)

200.description: List of device types with their owner

get.summary: List all schedules across users (admin only)

get.summary: List event logs with pagination (admin only)
